user.title: MeteoSwiss
user.description: Configure an official MeteoSwiss Open Data location. Leave point and station empty to use the nearest official data sources.

data_description.point_type_id: Optional. 1 = station, 2 = postal code, 3 = mountain point of interest.
data_description.station_abbr: Optional. Example: GVE, PAY, LUG, ABO.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure MeteoSwiss
reconfigure.description: Update the forecast point or observation station.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to fetch MeteoSwiss Open Data.
error.point_required: A forecast point ID is required when a point type is set.
error.point_type_required: A forecast point type is required when a point ID is set.

abort.already_configured: This MeteoSwiss location is already configured.
